title: Software Engineer, Salesforce
description:
**Company Description**
 LinkedIn is the world’s largest professional network, built to create economic opportunity for every member of the global workforce. Our products help people make powerful connections, discover exciting opportunities, build necessary skills, and gain valuable insights every day. We’re also committed to providing transformational opportunities for our own employees by investing in their growth. We aspire to create a culture that’s built on trust, care, inclusion, and fun – where everyone can succeed.
   

  

 Join us to transform the way the world works.
   

  

**Job Description**
 As a Salesforce Software Engineer, you’ll play a key role in designing, building, and maintaining scalable, secure, and high‑quality solutions on the Salesforce platform. You will work across frontend and backend development using Salesforce technologies, collaborate with cross‑functional partners, translate business needs into technical designs, and contribute to modern, AI‑powered customer experiences. Strong expertise in Salesforce fundamentals, LWC, Agentforce, Salesforce Data Cloud, and Generative‑AI–driven solutions is essential for success in this role.
   

  

 At LinkedIn, our approach to flexible work is centered on trust and optimized for culture, connection, clarity, and the evolving needs of our business. The work location of this role is hybrid, meaning it will be performed both from home and from a LinkedIn office on select days, as determined by the business needs of the team.
   

  

**Responsibilities**
* Design, develop, test, and deploy Salesforce applications using Apex, Lightning Web Components (LWC), and declarative tools.
* Build responsive, accessible user interfaces aligned with Salesforce Lightning Design System (SLDS).
* Develop backend logic, integrations, and APIs using Apex, REST/SOAP services, and platform events.
* Collaborate with Product Managers, SFDC Architects to translate business requirements into technical solutions
* Ensure solutions adhere to Salesforce best practices for security, performance, and scalability
* Write unit tests and participate in code reviews to maintain code quality
* Support CI/CD pipelines and participate in release management
* Troubleshoot production issues and contribute to ongoing system improvements
* Participate in Agile/Scrum development processes


**Qualifications**
 Basic Qualifications
   

  

* Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, Engineering, or equivalent practical experience
* 4 \\+ Years of Software Development Experience
* Experience developing software on the Salesforce platform
* Experience with Apex, SOQL/SOSL, and Lightning Web Components (LWC)
* Experience with JavaScript, HTML, and CSS
* Understanding of Salesforce security model (profiles, permission sets, sharing rules)
* Experience with version control systems (Git) and CI/CD tools
* Understanding of software engineering fundamentals (data structures, APIs, testing)
* Experience in Salesforce Data Cloud, Agentforce
* Experience in Cursor / Agentforce Vibe Coding


**Preferred Qualifications**
* Salesforce certifications (e.g., Platform Developer I / II, Sales Cloud, Service Cloud, Agentforce Specialist)
* 5\\+ Years of Software Development experience
* Exposure to Salesforce Data Cloud, Agentforce, or AI\\-driven features
* Experience with integration platforms (Boomi, ETL tools)
* Familiarity with Agile development methodologies


 Suggested Skills
   

  

* Lightning Web Components
* Apex
* Salesforce security model
* Salesforce Sales Cloud
* Salesforce Data Cloud
* Agentforce


 You will Benefit from our Culture:
   

  

 We strongly believe in the well\\-being of our employees and their families. That is why we offer generous health and wellness programs and time away for employees of all levels
   

  

**Additional Information**
**India Disability Policy**
 LinkedIn is an equal employment opportunity employer offering opportunities to all job seekers, including individuals with disabilities. For more information on our equal opportunity policy, please visit https://legal.linkedin.com/content/dam/legal/Policy\\_India\\_EqualOppPWD\\_9\\-12\\-2023\\.pdf

title: Software Engineer
description:
Please note this posting is to advertise potential job opportunities. This exact role may not be open today but could open in the near future. When you apply, a Cisco representative may contact you directly if a relevant position opens.
   

  

 Meet the Team
   

  

 The IBNG (Intent based Networking Group) develops software across the routing, switch and wireless platform portfolio at Cisco and is investing heavily to transform networking through cutting\\-edge solutions that will change the way IT is consumed. This means your work will transform our customers' consumption of our systems and solutions from every angle. Cisco's Enterprise Routing is multi\\-billion dollar growing business that generates its revenue primarily in the Mid\\-Range routing market space (Edge and Access Routing). The Portfolio of this team includes SDWAN, SASE, Branch Security, Application Aware Routing, Centralized Policy, Cloud Controllers, Cloud Networking, COLO, SaaS Gateway, Cloud onramp and other next generation technology for WAN Infra. Cisco's Enterprise Routing has Platforms from Low End branches to High End Data Centres and Cloud Router to Extend Enterprise Network.
   

  

 Your Impact
   

  

 We are seeking an experienced G6 Software UI Engineer with deep expertise in Angular, React, and Python to lead the design and development of scalable, high\\-performance web applications. As an Engineer, you will drive architecture and ensure the delivery of top\\-tier user experiences. You will work closely with cross\\-functional teams, influencing best practices and contributing to long\\-term technology strategies. Architect and develop highly scalable, responsive and Micro Front End UI applications.. Optimize frontend and backend performance for scalability, security, and high availability. Collaborate with product managers, UX designers, and backend teams to ensure a seamless user experience. Lead and participate in design reviews, code reviews, and architectural discussions. Who You Are We are looking for a high energy, self\\-motivated, bold, bright and empathetic Software UI Developer to join Enterprise Routing/SDWAN Technical UI Team. Be a part of Cisco's journey of Intent Based Networking, transforming the way people connect with technology. Independently able to execute given functionality or features. Team is responsible to build and constantly enhance end\\-to\\-end Solution Automation Framework for next generation SDWAN solutions, which include SASE, SaaS gateway, branch security, COLO, Application QoE, Application Aware Routing. Responsibility will also be to build solution on multi\\-cloud (AWS, GSP, Azure etc) environment, Cloud controllers, Application Analytics, REST Infra, follow CI/CD practices.
   

  

**Minimum Qualifications**
* Develop highly scalable, responsive UI applications using Angular (v14\\+) and React (v18\\+)
* 1\\-3 years of experience in UI development with strong expertise in Angular and React
* Proficiency in TypeScript, JavaScript (ES6\\+), HTML5, and CSS3
* Knowledge of Building Micro Front End Applications
* Deep knowledge of Python backend frameworks (Django, Flask, FastAPI) and API design.
* Strong experience with RESTful APIs, GraphQL, and WebSockets for efficient communication.
* Expertise in state management (NgRx, Redux, Zustand) and microfrontend architecture.
* Strong understanding of UI performance optimization, caching strategies, and accessibility
* Experience with Docker, Kubernetes, cloud platforms (AWS, Azure, GCP) for UI deployment.
* Familiarity with CI/CD pipelines, DevOps, and Infrastructure as Code .
* Experience leading large\\-scale UI projects, making architectural decisions, and mentoring teams.
* Knowledge of authentication and security best practices (OAuth2, JWT, SAML).


 Why Cisco?
   

  

 At Cisco, we’re revolutionizing how data and infrastructure connect and protect organizations in the AI era – and beyond. We’ve been innovating fearlessly for 40 years to create solutions that power how humans and technology work together across the physical and digital worlds. These solutions provide customers with unparalleled security, visibility, and insights across the entire digital footprint.
   

  

 Fueled by the depth and breadth of our technology, we experiment and create meaningful solutions. Add to that our worldwide network of doers and experts, and you’ll see that the opportunities to grow and build are limitless. We work as a team, collaborating with empathy to make really big things happen on a global scale. Because our solutions are everywhere, our impact is everywhere.
   

  

 We are Cisco, and our power starts with you.

title: Software Engineer
description:
**Meet the Team**
 Join the Cisco IIOT team in product development for Industrial IOT switching and routing products that transforms industrial operations. Cisco's IIOT team provides an outstanding, unique experience for software engineers by combining the resources offered by a sizable multi\\-geography organization and a large campus (with an on\\-site gym, healthcare, café, social interest groups, and philanthropy) with the startup culture and breadth of growth opportunities that working in a smaller teams can provide.
   

  

**Your Impact**
 In this pivotal role, you will drive the design and development of next\\-generation Control Plane and Data Plane software for Cisco's groundbreaking Networking and Network Security Platforms. Demonstrating AI and AI assist technologies, you will translate complex requirements into robust, scalable solutions, directly influencing the security and performance of Cisco's global infrastructure. You will lead significant features, innovate new intellectual property, and play a crucial part in shaping the future of secure networking.
   

  

**Responsibilities**
* Design and development of IIoT hardware platforms, ensuring seamless integration between hardware and software layers.
* Design and development of control plane and data plane software for Cisco IIOT Switching, Routing products.
* Design and develop low\\-level software components, including BSP, device drivers and kernel modules.
* Analyse requirements and problem statements to come with right software designs and solutions. To be able to write details Design documents and Functional Specifications.
* To Code and Unit Test Software components and modules. It is required to have strong white\\- box testing and automating skills. Triage, debug, and root cause simulation, software bring\\-up, and customer failures
* Work with local and remote teams to review Product Requirements Document, to collaborate on SW Functional and Design Specifications, Unit and Integration test plans. Also responsible for reviewing test strategy and test plans for Functional and System Test teams.
* To be able to innovate and come up with new ideas that can lead to filing patents and creating IP value for the company


**Minimum Qualifications**
* Bachelors (8\\-12 years) or Master’s degree(6\\-10 years) in Computer Science, EE/ECE or related fields.
* Prior work experience with control plane software or data plane software, data structures, Wireless experience (802\\.11ac/ax/be), Linux/RTOS/Networking OS internals
* Strong understanding of OS (e.g. Linux, RTOS, Unix) and experience working with Linux kernel, device drivers, and BSPs.
* Proficient in writing quality code in C/C\\+\\+.
* Experience in developing software/firmware for networking products.
* Excellent knowledge of software architecture and system design.
* Experience using Traffic generators/Analyzers such as IXIA/Sniffer is a plus.
* Technical leadership experience in leading high performance teams to provide technical leadership for designing and implementing quality features and solutions.
* Hands on experience with Gen AI assistant technologies, natural language processing (NLP) or Gen AI technologies (OpenAI, Gemini, MCP, Agentic AI etc..)


**Preferred Qualifications**
* Experience with debugging and verification methodologies
* You have hands\\-on development experience on L2, L3 protocols.
* Cisco Networking certificates such as CCNA, CCNP, CCIE are desirable.


 Why Cisco?
   

  

 At Cisco, we’re revolutionizing how data and infrastructure connect and protect organizations in the AI era – and beyond. We’ve been innovating fearlessly for 40 years to create solutions that power how humans and technology work together across the physical and digital worlds. These solutions provide customers with unparalleled security, visibility, and insights across the entire digital footprint.

title: (IND) Software Engineer III
description:
Position Summary...
   

  

 What you'll do...
   

  

**About Team:**
 Our team works closely with our US stores and eCommerce business to better serve customers by empowering team members, stores, and merchants with technological innovation. From groceries and entertainment to sporting goods and crafts, Walmart U.S. offers an extensive selection that our customers value, whether they shop online at Walmart.com, through one of our mobile apps, or in\\-store. Focus areas include customers, stores and employees, in\\-store service, merchant tools, merchant data science, and search and personalization.
   

  

 As a Software Engineer III, you will build and maintain iOS features and platform capabilities, solve moderately complex engineering problems using modern technology, and collaborate across functions to deliver reliable, performant, and delightful mobile experiences.
   

  

**What you'll do:**
 As a
 **Software Engineer III** 
 , you’ll help build and ship iOS applications that power Walmart’s e\\-commerce experience. You will:
   

  

* Design, develop, and maintain high\\-quality iOS features using modern iOS technologies and design patterns.
* Collaborate with product managers, designers, backend engineers, and QE to deliver seamless, secure, and intuitive mobile experiences.
* Contribute to technical design discussions and implement solutions that are scalable, testable, and maintainable.
* Own feature delivery for assigned projects—from implementation to deployment and production monitoring, with guidance from senior/staff engineers as needed.
* Write clean, well\\-tested code and participate actively in code reviews, helping uphold engineering standards and best practices.
* Optimize app performance, reliability, and user experience using profiling tools, crash analytics, and performance dashboards.
* Troubleshoot production issues using observability and monitoring tools such as OpenObserve, and drive fixes to closure.
* Work within modular codebases and contribute to architectures that integrate with GraphQL APIs and microservices\\-based backends.
* Implement and maintain automated tests (unit/functional/E2E) to ensure quality and support high\\-confidence releases.
* Assist in evaluating and integrating third\\-party SDKs/APIs to improve customer experience and engagement.
* Contribute to continuous improvement in development workflows, CI/CD practices, and team engineering processes.
* Stay current with iOS ecosystem changes, Apple platform updates, and emerging mobile trends.


**What you'll bring:**
* Bachelor’s or master’s degree in Computer Science or equivalent.

* Contributing to best\\-practices for building, testing, and releasing software.
* Identifying infrastructure needs and translating them into action.


**What We Need To See**
* BS or higher degree or equivalent experience in computer science.
* 5\\+ years of meaningful experience.
* Strong interests towards groundbreaking technologies and ability to take initiatives and drive them across multiple functional teams.
* Proven experience setting up, maintaining, and automating continuous integration systems.
* Proficiency in SCM (e.g. Perforce, Git) and build systems (e.g. make, cmake, bazel).
* Adept programming skills in Python (or similar).
* Passion for “it just works” automation and enabling team members.


**Ways To Stand Out From The Crowd**

* Track record of identifying useful new technologies and incorporating them into SW development flows.

description:

 This type of work—work that changes the world—is what the tech industry was founded on. So, if you're ready to seize the endless opportunities and leave your mark, come join us.
   

  

**THE ROLE**
 As a Member of Technical Staff on our Modern Virtualization team, you will architect the bridge between industry\\-leading storage hardware and the cloud\\-native ecosystem. You will drive the evolution of our Pure Integration Controller, ensuring mission\\-critical Kubernetes, Nutanix, and OpenStack environments achieve seamless enterprise\\-grade mobility. Collaborating with global engineering hubs, you’ll solve complex distributed systems challenges that directly enable our customers to scale their most vital automated infrastructures.
   

  

**What You'll Do**

* Scale Automation Frameworks: Continuously evolve our CI/CD and testing infrastructure to decrease time\\-to\\-market for new storage features while maintaining 100% data integrity standards.


**What You Bring**
* Systems Programming Expertise: Advanced proficiency in at least two core languages (Go, Java, or Python) with a proven ability to write clean, concurrent, and highly maintainable production\\-level code.
* Full\\-Stack Engineering Mindset: Demonstrated experience owning both the development and the comprehensive automated testing of complex software features, with a focus on building "self\\-healing" systems.
* Distributed Systems Fluency: A deep understanding of Linux environments and the ability to navigate complex networking or storage interactions within distributed architectures.
* Collaborative Problem Solving: A track record of participating in rigorous design reviews and working across time zones to deliver cohesive technical solutions.

title: Site Reliability Engineer
description:
**Who we are** 




 At Cerebrent, we design impactful experiences for our clients worldwide in various domains and emerging technologies. With an aggressive growth strategy, we are on our way to being a globally relevant, distributed, full\\-service software solutions organization with our group companies Clarient, Millipixels, UX Insights, and Evantiv.
 



  





**Job Summary** 




 As a Site Reliability Engineer, you will ensure the security and stability of our clients' AWS infrastructure. You will work closely with DevOps and Platform teams to ensure that large\\-scale production environments run smoothly and that our clients meet compliance requirements. You will also manage AWS storage solutions, monitoring and alerting, and backup and recovery processes.
 



 Proven experience in running production environments for high\\-traffic web environments on AWS is an absolute requirement.
 



  





**Key Responsibilities** 



* Mitigate security non\\-compliances identified by Security Hub and other tools.
* Attend to AWS Request for Actions (RFAs) promptly and efficiently.
* Decommission infrastructure safely and ensure proper documentation and communication.
* Replace our current AWS “NAS” storage solution and provide ongoing support.
* Architect and implement monitoring, logging, and alerting across the new infrastructure.
* Improve our AWS backup and recovery processes to minimize downtime and data loss.
* Provide business\\-as\\-usual (BAU) support for AWS tasks.



  





**Qualifications** 



* Bachelor's degree in Computer Science, Information Technology, or a related field.
* At least 5\\-6 years of experience in AWS in a production setting.
* Experience with AWS tracing and analysis, including CloudTrail and X\\-Ray.
* Hands\\-on experience architecting solutions around AWS Storage, including S3, EBS, and Glacier.
* Strong understanding of AWS security best practices and compliance requirements.
* Experience with AWS monitoring and alerting tools, including CloudWatch and CloudTrail.
* Experience with backup and recovery processes in AWS.
* Familiarity with AWS networking and infrastructure components.
* Excellent problem\\-solving and communication skills.
* AWS certification is a definite plus.



  





**Benefits** 



* Work in our FlexCampus model \\- have the freedom to work from anywhere \\- your home, our FlexCampus sites in Chandigarh, New Delhi, Mumbai, or Bangalore (more coming soon)
* Choose your own working times \\- focus on delivering targets, not on time spent.
* Medical Health Insurance \\- Company Paid Health insurance for ₹500,000 (with additional COVID hospitalization coverage). Option to extend to Spouse and/or other immediate dependents on cost.
* Company\\-paid participation in Industry\\-specific Seminars and Events
* Regular Financial, Tax\\-Saving, and Healthcare Advice Sessions from Experts, as well as Tax\\-saving Sodexo Meal Cards
* Technical Certification Reimbursements up to ₹1,00,000 (One Lac).
* Generous paid vacation (split over the course of the year, with tons of time off during Diwali and Christmas/New Year)



  





 If you are a highly skilled Senior AWS Cloud Architect with a passion for AWS and a desire to work with a dynamic team, we encourage you to apply for this exciting opportunity.

**Job Summary**

Lead the development of L2\\-L4 network security features, including stateful TCP/UDP inspection, across both hardware and virtual platforms. Develop scalable flow architecture for packet processing pipelines using DPDK for multi\\-core platforms and interface with ASIC functions. Architect and develop scalable software solutions for a distributed session architecture spanning across a cluster of firewalls. **Qualifications**

Expert in common network protocols such as TCP/IP, IPv4, IPv6, and multicast. Expert in data plane technologies like DPDK\\-based packet processing, performance tuning, and packet latency/loss analysis. Strong experience in packet processing, parsing, networking (L2\\-L4\\) protocols, and Layer\\-2/Layer\\-3/Layer\\-4 packet flow architecture. Preferred Qualifications Experience as a technical lead in networking domains. Experience using Broadcom/Marvell chips for switching, QoS, and interface management. In\\-depth understanding of common software vulnerabilities and mitigations. Strong experience in C\\+\\+/JAVA programming and XML/JSON understanding is desirable.

**What Candidate Would Do**

+ Implement secure, resilient services (retry, circuit breaker, bulkhead, idempotency)

* Develop Modern Web UIs

* Leverage AI Developer Tools to Deliver Faster
+ Use AI tools to accelerate code generation, refactoring, test authoring, documentation, and code review. Examples:
- GitHub Copilot / Copilot Chat for inline code suggestions, unit test scaffolding, and PR review comments.
- Tabnine, AWS CodeWhisperer, or Cursor/JetBrains AI Assistant for alternative code completions, refactors, and test cases.
- SonarLint/SonarQube/Snyk in AI‑assisted mode for security/code quality autofix suggestions.

+ Track and present AI efficiency metrics (e.g., % AI‑assisted lines, time saved per task, fewer defects per LOC).

* Own Full SDLC with Automation
+ Author high‑coverage unit tests (xUnit/NUnit), integration tests (WebApplicationFactory, Testcontainers), and end‑to‑end tests (Playwright/Cypress).

* Measure \\& Improve Engineering Excellence

+ Achieve first‑time‑right ≥ 90% (stories completed without rework).
+ Sustain velocity of \\~10–12 story points per engineer per sprint.
+ Monitor DORA metrics (Deployment Frequency, Lead Time, Change Failure Rate, MTTR) and code quality (defect density, maintainability index).

* Security, Compliance \\& Reliability
+ Implement OAuth2/OIDC, OWASP ASVS, input validation, secret management (Key Vault), and zero‑trust patterns.
+ Adhere to secure coding standards and perform automated security scans in CI.

* Collaboration \\& Communication
+ Partner with Product, Platform, and QA to refine backlog items with clear acceptance criteria.
+ Write concise ADRs, RFCs, and technical docs; lead design and post‑incident reviews.


**Engineering Metrics \\& Expectations**
**Candidate Will Be Complying To Both Outcomes And Behaviors**
- Say/Do Ratio ≥ 0\\.9 Definition: Delivered points / Committed points per sprint. Practice: Commit based on team capacity, keep WIP low, re‑plan early if blockers arise.

- First‑Time‑Right ≥ 85% Definition: Stories meeting acceptance criteria without rework or defect reopening. Practice: Collaborate on ACs, write contract tests, perform self‑QA, use AI to catch edge cases.

- Velocity \\~10–12 SP per sprint (individual) Definition: Sustainable delivery rate with stable scope. Practice: Slice work vertically, automate tests, pair program (human \\+ AI), remove toil.

- Quality \\& Flow

- Unit test coverage ≥ 80% on core modules; integration/E2E tests for critical paths.

 DORA targets: Frequent deploys (daily/weekly), short lead time (\\<1–2 days for small changes), low change failure rate (\\<15%), fast MTTR (\\<4 hours).
 - Code quality gates: No critical/severe static analysis issues; maintainability index ≥ threshold.

- AI Efficiency

* Demonstrate reduction in cycle time and defect rate vs. historical baselines.
